ambiguities: CC110000: Net label appears to be a schematic artifact or decoupling node label on the 1.2V rail; classified as power_rail but meaning is ambiguous.

CCAARRDD__DDEETTEECCTT / CCDD//DDAATT33 / CCLLKK / CCMMDD: All four nets have doubled characters in their labels, strongly suggesting a schematic font/rendering artifact for SD card signals (CARD_DETECT, CD/DAT3, CLK, CMD). Classified as storage with reduced confidence.
ADDR: Only connects to DSI-to-eDP bridge U10 pin 1; likely an I2C address select or config strapping pin — classified as display with moderate confidence.
COM: Connects to Ethernet magnetics PP11 pin 16; likely transformer center-tap bias node — classified as ethernet with moderate confidence.
CSI_P2_*: These nets are labeled CSI (camera serial interface) but on the MNT Reform the SoC's MIPI lanes serve the DSI-to-eDP bridge; classified as display but could be camera-related misc.
DDAATT00/DDAATT11/DDAATT22 — obfuscated net names on page 9 (SD card sheet); classified as storage based on sheet context and double-letter naming pattern, but no connects listed to confirm.
DIR — direction control on U28 (ESD protection for SD card, page 9); classified storage but could be a generic control signal.
FAST_BOOT — SoC boot configuration pin; classified misc as it is a boot-mode strap rather than a clear domain-specific signal.
FBG — feedback ground node of power converter U2; may be a power_rail internal node; classified power_rail with low confidence.
FLG — flag/fault output from U20 (mPCIe sheet, page 8); classified power_seq as it likely indicates power good/fault, but could be misc.
